docs.title: Letter 18
docs.author: Pope Leo the Great

docs.excerpt: … knew — and congratulate you on the watchful care you show as a pastor in guarding Christ's flock, so that wolves entering under the guise of sheep cannot tear the innocent apart in their savage fury, nor corrupt those who remain sound.
